name: Chef Freddy's Strawberry-Glazed Fruit Tart
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the pie shell according to package directions and sprinkle with 1 tablespoon of cinnamon-sugar before baking.
2. In a large bowl, toss together the fruit slices and pineapple chunks, then chill while the pie shell cools.
3. Stir in the strawberry glaze until combined, then add the fruit mixture to the pie shell, being careful not to overfill it. Sprinkle additional cinnamon-sugar on top.
4. Chill for at least 1 hour, or overnight. Top with whipped cream or other desired toppings and serve chilled.
Source: Adapted from a recipe found in Cyber-space (MM format) by Fred Goslin in Chef Freddy's Kitchen @ Cyberealm Bbs, home of KookNet, Watertown NY (315) 786-1120.
